testcase.name: @BeforeMethod beforeMethod

testcase.name: invalidLoginTestWithWrongPassword

failure.message: Method public void parameterizedProject.DPDemoBlaze.invalidLoginTestWithWrongPassword(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) requires a @DataProvider named : dataSet in class parameterizedProject.DataSet

testcase.failure: org.testng.TestNGException: Method public void parameterizedProject.DPDemoBlaze.invalidLoginTestWithWrongPassword(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) requires a @DataProvider named : dataSet in class parameterizedProject.DataSet at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:539) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:264) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1136) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:635) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:840) ...
